title: rosa tomentosa var. mollis
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. mollis, also known as the hairy rose or Chinese rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. Rosa tomentosa var. mollis is used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, such as boosting the immune system and reducing stress.
